event_name: West Shore RCMP Barn Dance in Support of Cops for Cancer
description: Kick up your boots at the West Shore RCMP Barn Dance and support Cops for Cancer! West Shore RCMP Barn Dance - Presented by Westshore Towing. Join us for an unforgettable western-themed evening in support of Cops for Cancer Tour de Rock! Dust off your boots and grab your cowboy hat for a night filled with dinner, live music, dancing, prizes, family-friendly activities, and more. The evening kicks off with dinner provided by Quality Foods, followed by live entertainment from Victoria's own rock & roll dance band, Late Shift, starting at 7:00 PM. Throughout the night, enjoy raffle prizes, a 50/50 draw, a country-themed photo booth, and plenty of chances to win. All funds raised support Cops for Cancer Tour de Rock, helping to fund life-saving pediatric cancer research and essential support programs like Camp Goodtimes. Doors open at 5:30 pm.

At the end, there will be a pressure-free, silly, wild, and weird performance.
